author: lOrm
content: Fixed in src/tui/app.rs. Regex hoisted to FILE_REF_RE: LazyLock<regex::Regex> static — compiled once at first use, zero per-keystroke allocation. cap.get(0).unwrap() replaced with match+continue. cap.get(1).or(cap.get(2)).unwrap() replaced with match+continue. 6 regression tests added: expand_file_refs_no_at_sign_returns_input_unchanged, expand_file_refs_double_at_does_not_panic, expand_file_refs_unclosed_quote_does_not_panic, expand_file_refs_absolute_path_outside_cwd_is_blocked, expand_file_refs_nonexistent_file_is_graceful, expand_file_refs_many_at_signs_does_not_panic.
